'''yabudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yohimbin|yohimbin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yohimbin|yohimbin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yabudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæbidhith|yæbidhith]] || [[word:yæbidhij|yæbidhij]] || [[word:yæbidhish|yæbidhish]] || [[word:yæbidhi|yæbidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yabubudhuth|yabubudhuth]] || [[word:yabubudhuj|yabubudhuj]] || [[word:yabubudhush|yabubudhush]] || [[word:yabubudhu|yabubudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yabudhuth|yabudhuth]] || [[word:yabudhuj|yabudhuj]] || [[word:yabudhush|yabudhush]] || [[word:yabudhu|yabudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yabufdhuth|yabufdhuth]] || [[word:yabufdhuj|yabufdhuj]] || [[word:yabufdhush|yabufdhush]] || [[word:yabufdhuf|yabufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yabudhuthu|yabudhuthu]] || [[word:yabudhuju|yabudhuju]] || [[word:yabudhushu|yabudhushu]] || [[word:yabudhuku|yabudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yabudhuth|yabudhuth]] || [[word:yabudhuj|yabudhuj]] || [[word:yabudhush|yabudhush]] || [[word:yabudhu|yabudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yabudhuthul|yabudhuthul]] || [[word:yabudhujul|yabudhujul]] || [[word:yabudhushul|yabudhushul]] || [[word:yabudhukul|yabudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yabudhuthuthu|yabudhuthuthu]] || [[word:yabudhujuju|yabudhujuju]] || [[word:yabudhushushu|yabudhushushu]] || [[word:yabudhuku|yabudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yabudhuthun|yabudhuthun]] || [[word:yabudhujun|yabudhujun]] || [[word:yabudhushun|yabudhushun]] || [[word:yabudhukun|yabudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yabudhuthuoro|yabudhuthuoro]] || [[word:yabudhujuoro|yabudhujuoro]] || [[word:yabudhushuoro|yabudhushuoro]] || [[word:yabudhukuoro|yabudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
